content.query:
CREATE VIEW     v_InventoryFeed
-- drop view v_InventoryFeed
AS
SELECT          CT.CUNO AS      [Customer Number]
,               OC.CUNM AS      [Customer Name]
,               CT.ITNO AS      [Item Number]
,               B.[Translated Item Number] AS [Item Number on Portal]
,               CT.POPN AS      [Alias Number]
,               OC.WHLO AS      [Warehouse]
,               OC.ORTP AS      [Order Type]
,               CG.A030 AS      [Default Delivery Term]
,               CG.A130 AS      [LiftGate Item]
,               CT.ITDS AS      [Alt Inventory ID]
,               MP.POPN AS      [UPC]
,               MP.ALWT AS      [UPC Category]
,               OB.SPNR AS      [Price]
FROM            M3.OCUSIT CT
JOIN            M3.OCUSMA OC ON CT.CUNO = OC.CUNO
LEFT JOIN       M3.MITPOP MP ON CT.ITNO = MP.ITNO AND MP.ALWQ = 'UPC' AND MP.ALWT = '2'
LEFT JOIN       M3.CUGEX1 CG ON CG.[FILE] = 'OCUSIT' AND CT.CUNO = CG.PK01 AND CT.ITNO = CG.PK02
LEFT JOIN       M3.OPRBAS OB ON CT.CUNO = OB.PRRF AND CT.ITNO = OB.ITNO
LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT      EXTP       AS [Customer Number]
,           MVXD       AS [Item Number]
,           MBMD       AS [Translated Item Number]
FROM        M3.MBMTRD
WHERE       IDTR = 215
) B ON      CT.ITNO = B.[Item Number] AND CT.CUNO = B.[Customer Number]
